message:
fix(net): fix QUIC stream count leak and connection close cleanup

- quic.c: asx_quic_stream_close now decrements the parent connection's
  stream_count, allowing new streams to be opened after closing old ones
- quic.c: asx_quic_conn_close now closes all orphaned streams belonging
  to the connection before marking it dead
- http.c: fix http_strcasecmp NULL handling to always return non-equal
  (was returning pointer comparison result)
- Added 2 regression tests: quic_stream_reopen_after_close and
  quic_conn_close_cleans_streams

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
